input: What annual leave am I entitled to?
context: User profile: Location London UK. Job title Software Engineer.
expected_behavior: Agent should prioritize UK Leave Policies since the user is UK-based. UK employees get 28 days paid inclusive of 8 bank holidays, with additional days for 5+ years service.
expected_facts: 28 days paid annual leave|Inclusive of 8 bank holidays|Full-time is 37.5 hours/week|5+ years continuous service gets 1 extra day/year up to 5 extra days|Max 33 days total
not_expected: Defaulting to US PTO accrual table (15/20/25/30 days)|Showing US leave policy first

input: What annual leave am I entitled to?
context: User profile: Location New York US. Job title Marketing Manager.
expected_behavior: Agent should prioritize US Leave Policy (HR-POL-006). PTO is tiered by tenure: 0-2 yrs 15 days; 3-5 yrs 20 days; 6-9 yrs 25 days; 10+ yrs 30 days. May ask about tenure.
expected_facts: PTO accrual tiered by tenure|0-2 years 15 days|3-5 years 20 days|6-9 years 25 days|10+ years 30 days|HR-POL-006
not_expected: Showing UK leave policy first|28 days UK annual leave

input: What public holidays do I get?
expected_behavior: Agent should provide UK bank holidays from the UK Leave Policies document: Jan 1; Apr 18; Apr 21; May 5; May 26; Aug 25; Dec 25; Dec 26.
not_expected: US holidays like MLK Day or Juneteenth or Independence Day or Thanksgiving

input: What sick leave am I entitled to?
context: User profile: Location London UK. Job title Senior Engineer.
expected_behavior: Agent should provide UK sick pay: days 1-10 full pay; 11-30 at 75%; 31-90 at 50%; after 90 days SSP £116.75/week.
expected_facts: Days 1-10 full pay|Days 11-30 at 75%|Days 31-90 at 50%|After 90 days SSP £116.75/week|Fit note required after 7 days
not_expected: US sick leave of 10 days/80 hours

context: User profile: Location San Francisco US. Job title Director of Engineering.
expected_behavior: Agent should provide US parental leave from HR-POL-006. May ask about primary vs secondary caregiver (16 weeks vs 6 weeks). Must have 6 months continuous employment.
expected_facts: Primary caregiver 16 weeks paid|Secondary caregiver 6 weeks paid|Must have 6 months continuous employment|Must be taken within 12 months of event|HR-POL-006
not_expected: UK maternity leave (52 weeks)|UK paternity leave

context: User profile: Location London UK. Job title Product Manager.
expected_behavior: Agent should provide UK maternity leave from UK Leave Policies: up to 52 weeks; enhanced pay weeks 1-8 at 100% and 9-16 at 75%; SMP after that.
expected_facts: Up to 52 weeks|OML 26 weeks plus AML 26 weeks|Weeks 1-8 at 100%|Weeks 9-16 at 75%|Weeks 17-39 SMP £184.03/week|KIT days up to 10|26 weeks continuous employment required
not_expected: US parental leave (16 weeks primary/6 weeks secondary)

input: What leave policies apply to me?
context: User profile does not indicate a clear location.
expected_behavior: Agent should ask about location since US and UK leave policies differ significantly. Should not assume either.
expected_facts: Should ask about location or office|US and UK leave policies differ
not_expected: Assuming US or UK without clarification

input: What is the bereavement leave policy?
expected_behavior: Agent should provide UK bereavement from UK Leave Policies: spouse/partner/child/parent 10 days; sibling/grandparent/grandchild 5 days; other close relative 3 days; parental bereavement enhanced to 4 weeks full pay.
expected_facts: Spouse/partner/child/parent 10 days paid|Sibling/grandparent/grandchild 5 days|Other close relative/friend 3 days|Parental bereavement leave enhanced to 4 weeks full pay
not_expected: US bereavement (5 days for spouse/child/parent and 3 days for sibling/grandparent)
